summary: Bug Fix Verified: Training tab crash when clicking View on training certificate. The fix changed handleViewCertificate -> handleViewTrainingCertificate and handleDownloadCertificate -> handleDownloadTrainingCertificate. All Training tab actions now work without crashing.

issues: Minor: Console warning about missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: ✅ Training tab loads without crash (6 training records displayed)
✅ View Evidence button works - opens certificate preview modal (handleViewTrainingCertificate)
✅ Download button works - triggers certificate download (handleDownloadTrainingCertificate)
✅ Dropdown menu opens with 4 options: Remove Verification, Edit/Correct, View History, Delete Record
✅ Edit/Correct dialog opens successfully with field selection and reason input
✅ View History dialog opens showing training record history (verify, unverify, upload actions)
✅ Delete Record dialog opens with confirmation and reason input
✅ Verify/Unverify options available in dropdown menu
✅ No ReferenceError: handleViewCertificate is not defined
✅ No JavaScript errors in console during Training tab interactions
✅ What's Needed tab shows 100% Complete status (all training verified)
critical_code_review_comments: handleViewTrainingCertificate correctly defined at line 1010 with null check for trainingId
handleDownloadTrainingCertificate correctly defined at line 1021 with null check for trainingId
Training tab actions at line 4781 and 4794 correctly use handleViewTrainingCertificate and handleDownloadTrainingCertificate
All dropdown menu actions (Edit/Correct, View History, Delete, Verify/Unverify) work correctly

bug_fix_verified.root_cause: Training tab used undefined function names (handleViewCertificate, handleDownloadCertificate) instead of the correct ones (handleViewTrainingCertificate, handleDownloadTrainingCertificate)
bug_fix_verified.fix_applied: Changed handleViewCertificate -> handleViewTrainingCertificate and handleDownloadCertificate -> handleDownloadTrainingCertificate at lines 4781 and 4794
bug_fix_verified.fix_status: VERIFIED - All Training tab actions work without crashing

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test employee Olakunle Alonge with 6 training records
